scripts.run: COMPOSE_PROJECT_NAME="programmers-badge-${CONDUCTOR_PORT}" API_PORT="$((CONDUCTOR_PORT + 1))" WEB_PORT="$CONDUCTOR_PORT" PUBLIC_BASE_URL="http://localhost:$((CONDUCTOR_PORT + 1))" VITE_API_BASE_URL="http://localhost:$((CONDUCTOR_PORT + 1))" docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml up --build
